Data Processing Annex (MY) — Aurum Kelana Berhad (Reg. No. AKB202000123) as Data User and Cloudhost Nusantara Pte. Ltd. as Processor for HR onboarding, financing diligence, and vendor onboarding workflows of a Malaysian exchange-listed issuer.
PDPA roles and legal basis: processing necessary for employment contracts and legitimate interests; sensitive personal data (e.g., health declaration for insurance enrolment) by explicit consent; no biometric or precise geolocation is collected.
Data minimisation: only name, employee ID, contact, role, bank account alias, tax file reference and referee contacts are collected; family NRIC numbers and unrelated background data are not collected.
DSAR: data subjects may submit access/correction/erasure requests via privacy@aurumkelana.my or https://privacy.aurumkelana.my/dsar; acknowledgement within 7 days and substantive response within 21 days per PDPA 2010.
Consent withdrawal: staff may withdraw consent for optional health/referee data by emailing Pn. Rina Dahlan (DPO) at rina.dahlan@aurumkelana.my; withdrawal does not affect processing required by law or contract performance.
Retention and erasure: onboarding forms retained 7 years post-separation; financing diligence files retained 3 years; legal holds override erasure; erasure executed within 30 days after holds lift with purge log AKB-RET-2026-07 archived.
Cross-border transfer: limited to encrypted hosting in Singapore by Cloudhost Nusantara; consent captured in onboarding forms; PDPA s129 conditions addressed via Transfer Impact Assessment BK-TIA-2026-03; approval closed by Compliance on 2026-03-18.
Security and completed control: vendor access review completed 2026-04-30; dormant admin accounts disabled and MFA enforced; no open high-risk findings at last audit.
MNPI controls: any non-public, price-sensitive information in financing documents is segregated to the Disclosure Committee workspace under the Exchange blackout policy; HR processors do not access or export MNPI.
This note does not authorise new transfers; it records that cross-border approval BK-TR-2026-014 is completed and no syncing occurs outside the sanctioned region.
Subprocessors: Kencana Payroll Sdn Bhd (MY-only) for payroll calculation; no onward transfer to marketing or data brokers; DPIA reference AKB-DPIA-EMP-2026-02.
DSAR handling nuance: where erasure conflicts with Companies Act record-keeping or audit evidence for listing compliance, requests are deferred with reasons and partial redaction applied where feasible.
Training and governance: PDPA and exchange disclosure awareness completed 2026-05-10 by En. Hariz Muzaffar (HR Ops), logged under AKB-TRN-9911; refresher due annually.
Incident response: any suspected breach reported to DPO within 24 hours; there have been no notifiable incidents in the last 12 months.
Contact: Pn. Rina Dahlan, Data Protection Officer, Aurum Kelana Berhad; dpo@aurumkelana.my; +60 16-555 9982.
Clarification: government-issued identifiers for contractors are not stored in the cloud; local storage uses field-level encryption with keys held solely by Aurum Kelana.
